goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the 'north'.
The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in 'the type of guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'persian' food and should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'italian' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '1 people' at '18:45' on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the north
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the type of hotel
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get whether they have free parking
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve persian food and should be in the same area as the hotel
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 18:45 on sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
